name: Mississippi Delta Eggnog
recipeInstructions:
1. In the bowl of an electric mixer, beat the egg yolks and sugar until light and lemon-colored.
2. Gradually add the bourbon, continuing to beat on low speed.
3. In a separate bowl, whip the heavy cream until stiff. Fold it into the egg-yolk mixture.
4. In a clean bowl, whisk the egg whites until stiff and fold them into the eggnog.
5. Serve in goblets, garnished with a generous grating of nutmeg.
